_note: Strict, recipe-owned spec read by c-eval-runner. A brand may layer brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json to TIGHTEN thresholds (same id wins; new ids appended). See cfw-skills-pack/docs/skills-audit.md §4.

checks.desc: (a) Background behind/around the PIP is NOT black — real footage or motion graphics are visible on every sample frame.
(b) Complete face shows in the PIP card — forehead to chin visible, not cropped at top or bottom, not stretched.
(c) PIP card is fully on-screen with a visible bottom margin — entire card inside the frame with a clear gap at the bottom (110px margin enforced).
(d) Graphics and captions occupy the upper zone only (pip-safe variant); nothing invades the bottom band where the PIP sits.
(e) Background fills the full frame width — no pillarbox bars, no letterbox bands, no distortion.
(f) Captions are legible with brand accent on emphasis words and do NOT overlap the PIP card.
(g) Frame 0 (cover) shows the money-shot from cover_at — not a black frame or hook-animation blank.
